result.status_detail: Post-stash-recovery retest reproduces #1139: submit succeeded, no message bubbles or warning text rendered after 60s+

notes: Direct /chat URL retest with PII prompt (901010-1234567). Navigated to https://www.notion.com/chat, hard-reloaded, logged-in confirmed (최장희's Space). Pasted prompt into input id=17 — DOM showed full text loaded in editor (value verified). Clicked 'AI 메시지 제출하기' submit button (id=22). URL changed to notion.so/chat?t=3659aa2d8bdd8021b9db00a9e68b8518&wfv=chat (chat session token assigned), input cleared — confirms submit succeeded. Waited 60s+. Final screenshot + DOM snapshot show conversation area completely BLANK: NO user message bubble, NO AI response stream, NO '차단' warning text anywhere. Identical pattern to #1139 FAIL_NOT_RENDERED. Stash recovery did NOT fix the warning render path for notion — Phase 6 impl regression persists on direct /chat URL too. Engine intercept fired (no AI reply attempted) but warning UI fails to render.
